opportunities.title: Surf & Sales 2026
opportunities.fit_reason: An intimate, relationship-driven sales leadership retreat built on 'shared experience, trust, and respect' is a natural stage for a trust-based selling coach to lead a small-group session.

opportunities.title: Sales Enablement Summit - Sydney
opportunities.deadline: Not specified - contact organizers for speaking opportunities
opportunities.fit_reason: This Sydney summit gathers senior sales enablement and effectiveness leaders from companies like Adobe, Oracle and REA Group, an ideal audience for a session on building trust-based B2B sales culture.

opportunities.title: AI Sales Summit (Sales 3.0 Conference series)
opportunities.deadline: Contact organizers to nominate as speaker
opportunities.fit_reason: Selling Power's virtual summit features 'sales VPs and CEOs from industry-leading companies, technology influencers, analysts, and management and leadership experts,' and explicitly invites speaker nominations, fitting a trust-based sales culture keynote.

opportunities.title: Sales Training and Enablement Summit (Sales 3.0 Conference series)
opportunities.deadline: Contact organizers to nominate as speaker
opportunities.fit_reason: A virtual sales training and enablement focused event where 'you can also nominate a speaker,' well suited to a keynote on trust-based selling techniques and sales culture.

opportunities.title: Dreamforce 2026
opportunities.deadline: Check Salesforce speaker/session nomination process on event site
opportunities.fit_reason: Dreamforce is a major annual conference hosted by Salesforce, bringing together industry leaders, innovators, and Salesforce users to explore the latest in technology and business solutions, offering breakout/track sessions relevant to sales culture and leadership.

opportunities.title: UNBOUND 26 (formerly INBOUND)
opportunities.fit_reason: UNBOUND 26 brings together marketing, sales, and customer experience leaders for three days focused on growth, with dedicated GTM and sales tracks well suited to a trust-based selling keynote.

opportunities.title: Pavilion GTM Conference 2026
opportunities.date: September 28 - October 1, 2026, New York City, NY
opportunities.fit_reason: Described as the only B2B tech conference exclusively for GTM executives, featuring 'real conversations, not vendor pitches,' a strong match for authentic, trust-based sales leadership content.

opportunities.title: B.I.T.E Business Conference 2026
opportunities.fit_reason: A regional business growth conference for 'bold business owners ready to rethink what's possible, reinvent how they operate, and reignite their growth,' a good venue for a sales culture and trust-based selling keynote to SME owners.

opportunities.title: The Business of Speaking Conference 2026
opportunities.fit_reason: Billed as 'Australia's leading conference for professionals, experts and aspiring speakers building high-revenue speaking businesses,' a strategic networking and positioning opportunity for a professional sales keynote speaker.

opportunities.title: Digital Summit Speaker Applications (multiple US cities)
opportunities.date: Rolling events across Chicago, Dallas, Denver, Minneapolis, Philadelphia, Raleigh, Tampa, Atlanta
opportunities.fit_reason: Digital Summit runs an open, rolling call for 'trend setting speakers' across eight US markets, offering multiple business-audience venues for a sales culture keynote.

opportunities.title: ANA Marketing Conferences Speaker Submission
opportunities.fit_reason: ANA explicitly welcomes non-client-side presenters such as consultants to submit session proposals, giving a trust-based sales coach a route into senior marketing/sales leadership audiences.

opportunities.title: B2B Marketing Exchange (B2BMX) Speaker Submission
opportunities.deadline: Rolling - fill out speaker submission form
opportunities.fit_reason: B2BMX's open call invites speaker submissions for sessions unifying B2B marketing and sales audiences, a relevant stage for B2B sales culture content.

opportunities.title: APMP 2026 Call for Speakers
opportunities.organization: Association of Proposal Management Professionals (APMP), Australia/NZ
opportunities.deadline: Submit Expression of Interest via event site
opportunities.fit_reason: APMP's call seeks speakers on topics like reputation management, ROI of proposals, and stakeholder trust-building for bid and business-development professionals, closely aligned with trust-based selling principles.

opportunities.title: Selling in Asia Podcast - Guest Submission
opportunities.fit_reason: This podcast explicitly seeks 'a top-performing sales professional, a sales leader or a sales expert' as guests, a strong match for a trust-based sales coach targeting an APAC sales audience.

opportunities.title: The Sales Podcast - Guest Booking
opportunities.fit_reason: A long-running US sales podcast open to bookings from sales experts, giving a trust-based selling coach direct access to an engaged sales practitioner audience.

opportunities.title: The Sales Ladder Podcast - Guest Application
opportunities.fit_reason: This podcast interviews 'inspiring sales leaders sharing their tips, tricks, and experience,' making it a good fit for discussing trust-based selling frameworks with sales leaders and reps.

opportunities.title: High Ticket Success Podcast - Be a Guest
opportunities.organization: Dave Dubeau / High Ticket Success Podcast
opportunities.fit_reason: The show actively invites 'High Ticket Coach, Consultant or Advisor' guests to share sales and mindset expertise, aligning well with a trust-based sales coaching angle.

opportunities.title: The How of Business Podcast - Guest Submission
opportunities.fit_reason: This business-focused podcast seeks professionals 'who offer products or services to small businesses' with knowledge to share, a fit for sales culture and trust-based selling insights for entrepreneurs.
